content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
CAUTION regime — low volatility 21.7% but very narrow participation with breadth 1/8 sectors positive; volatility score +1, breadth score -1. Market message: low volatility masks concentrated risk.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Construction & REIT leading: ALARK (1W: +7.70% | 1M: +12.13%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +3.85% | 1M: -9.53%) RECOVERY, ENKAI (1W: +0.39% | 1M: -8.12%) RECOVERY.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Technology & Telecom, Energy & Chemicals and Heavy Industry are the weakest: KONTR (1W: -29.78% | 1M: -60.20%) BELOW TREND, HEKTS (1W: -17.29% | 1M: -16.67%) BELOW TREND, SASA (1W: -7.20% | 1M: -8.92%) BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
ALARK (1W: +7.70% | 1M: +12.13%) ABOVE TREND, CCOLA (1W: +7.02% | 1M: +1.90%) ABOVE TREND, VESTL (1W: +4.37% | 1M: -2.50%) RECOVERY, TKFEN (1W: +3.85% | 1M: -9.53%) RECOVERY, TUPRS (1W: +3.22% | 1M: -7.10%) RECOVERY.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
KONTR (1W: -29.78% | 1M: -60.20%) BELOW TREND, HEKTS (1W: -17.29% | 1M: -16.67%) BELOW TREND, ASELS (1W: -11.99% | 1M: -10.16%) BELOW TREND, TOASO (1W: -10.72% | 1M: +4.05%) CORRECTION, GUBRF (1W: -7.42% | 1M: -17.86%) BELOW TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
Upside momentum: ALARK (1W: +7.70% | 1M: +12.13%) ABOVE TREND, CCOLA (1W: +7.02% | 1M: +1.90%) ABOVE TREND; downside momentum: KONTR (1W: -29.78% | 1M: -60.20%) BELOW TREND, HEKTS (1W: -17.29% | 1M: -16.67%) BELOW TREND, ASELS (1W: -11.99% | 1M: -10.16%) BELOW TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banking shows divergence: AKBNK (1W: -4.35% | 1M: +20.88%) CORRECTION, GARAN (1W: -1.92% | 1M: +12.10%) CORRECTION, ISCTR (1W: -2.44% | 1M: +13.05%) CORRECTION, YKBNK (1W: -6.39% | 1M: +20.11%) CORRECTION — strong 1M gains but short-term profit taking.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy industry mixed to weak: EREGL (1W: +1.66% | 1M: +2.58%) ABOVE TREND, VESTL (1W: +4.37% | 1M: -2.50%) RECOVERY, ASELS (1W: -11.99% | 1M: -10.16%) BELOW TREND, TOASO (1W: -10.72% | 1M: +4.05%) CORRECTION.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy is under pressure with selective rebounds: TUPRS (1W: +3.22% | 1M: -7.10%) RECOVERY, SASA (1W: -7.20% | 1M: -8.92%) BELOW TREND, HEKTS (1W: -17.29% | 1M: -16.67%) BELOW TREND, TRALT (1W: -6.39% | 1M: +7.67%) CORRECTION.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Adopt a selective stance: trim exposure to beaten-down cyclicals and tech/telecom, hold or add to high-conviction leaders in Construction & select Industrials, and keep liquidity to exploit mean-reversion or a breadth pickup given narrow participation.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
ALARK (1W: +7.70% | 1M: +12.13%) ABOVE TREND for continuation, YKBNK (1W: -6.39% | 1M: +20.11%) CORRECTION for rebound risk, KONTR (1W: -29.78% | 1M: -60.20%) BELOW TREND for washout/volatility, TUPRS (1W: +3.22% | 1M: -7.10%) RECOVERY, EREGL (1W: +1.66% | 1M: +2.58%) ABOVE TREND.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Construction & REIT for leadership continuation, Banking for volatility and mean-reversion after sharp 1M gains, Energy for earnings/commodity sensitivity.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Monitor XU100 for failure below the short-term support (watch 20-day MA) and any break above recent highs to confirm breadth pickup; catalysts are CBRT communication, USD/TRY moves, commodity prices and global risk sentiment.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
CAUTION regime: low volatility with very narrow breadth — market up-moves concentrated in Construction & a few retail names while tech, energy and parts of heavy industry are under heavy selling pressure. Stay selective, protect capital on weak names and watch banking and energy for near-term mean-reversion or continued dispersion.
